1.title: Network interface packets received on host
1.query:
timeseries rx = avg(dt.host.net.nic.packets.rx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(rx) desc
| limit 10

2.title: Network interface packets sent on host
2.query:
timeseries tx = avg(dt.host.net.nic.packets.tx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(tx) desc
| limit 10

4.title: Network interface bytes received on host
4.query:
timeseries bytes_rx = avg(dt.host.net.nic.bytes_rx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(bytes_rx) desc
| limit 10

5.title: Network interface bytes sent on host
5.query:
timeseries bytes_tx = avg(dt.host.net.nic.bytes_tx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(bytes_tx) desc
| limit 10

10.title: Network interface receive link utilization on host
10.query:
timeseries link_util_rx = avg(dt.host.net.nic.link_util_rx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)

  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
